solution.rawText:
We do not have a rule for integrating |x|, so we will split this into two separate integrals, one
from x = −1 to x = 0, where |x| = −x, and one from x = 0 to x = 3, where |x| = x. This gives
                    Z 3                     Z 0                        Z 3
                          |x|(1 − x) dx =            |x|(1 − x) dx +            |x|(1 − x) dx
                     −1                      −1                            0
                                            Z 0                            Z 3
                                       =             (−x)(1 − x) dx +              x(1 − x) dx
                                             −1                                0
                                            Z 0                    Z 3
                                                            2
                                       =             −x + x dx +               x − x2 dx
                                                −1                     0
                                                0            3
                                          x2 x3
                                                      2
                                                           x3
                                            
                                                      x
                                       = − +       +     −
                                          2  3 −1      2   3 0
                                       = −(− 12 − 13 ) + ( 92 − 9)
                                       = 65 − 92
                                       = − 22
                                           6
                                       = − 11
                                           3

so the correct answer is F.
